ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot putting on a military helmet.  The movement starts with arms down, then raises to the head, places the helmet, and then returns to a neutral position. The movement is deliberate and somewhat stiff, reflecting the nature of the action and the robot's nature. Frame 1 shows the robot's arms relaxed at its sides. Frame 2 shows both arms raising to the head level, palms up and slightly forward. Frame 3 shows the robot positioning the helmet onto its head. Frame 4 shows the robot's arms lowering back down to its sides, returning to a neutral pose.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
arms rise to the head, ready to don the helmet
the helmet is carefully placed on the head
arms return to a neutral, ready position
